---
name: Installation problem
about: Report a problem installing ALEA-R
title: "[Installation]: "
labels: installation
assignees: ""
---

## Installation command used

```r
remotes::install_github("hydrostat/ALEA")
```

## Error message

Paste the full installation error message here.

## Operating system

For example: Windows 11, macOS, Ubuntu.

## R version

```r
R.version.string
```

## ALEA-R version, if installed

```r
packageVersion("ALEA")
```

## Session info

```r
sessionInfo()
```
